title: I Am Pibble, Wash My Belly
about: I Am Pibble, Wash My Belly, also known as I Am Pibble, Wash Ma Belly, refers to a viral TikTok audio of a cute, baby voice saying, "I am Pibble, wash my belly," which is said by a French bulldog puppy called "Pibble" in series of image macros and video memes online. The original sound was created by Instagram user @pibbygabe in March 2025. Variants of the sound, which remixed it with different songs and audios, surfaced in the following months, such as "Wash My Belly, Yay" and "Clean My Belly."
origin: On March 31st, 2025, Instagram[1] user @pibbygabe shared a video that used a clip from the Instagram account @frenchies_union, which showed a French bulldog puppy getting its belly washed. The video had a text overlay caption that read, "Pibble DEMANDS a belly wash," and had a high-pitched voiceover that said, "I am Pibble, wash my belly." Over seven months, the Reel received over 319,200 likes.
